name: tinyreplay
description: Small self-hosted session replay for local-first teams.

scripts.dev: npm run build -w packages/sdk && concurrently "npm run dev -w packages/sdk" "npm run dev -w apps/server"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/sdk && npm run build -w apps/server && npm run build -w docs
scripts.test: npm run test -w packages/sdk && npm run test -w apps/server
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w packages/sdk && npm run lint -w apps/server && npm run lint -w docs
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w packages/sdk && npm run typecheck -w apps/server && npm run typecheck -w docs
scripts.check: npm run check:format && npm run lint && npm run check:architecture && npm run check:dead-code && npm run check:forbidden && npm run check:secrets && npm run build && npm run test
